title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India Global Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India Global Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? iGate India Global Group in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About iGate India Global Group:
iGate India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India Global Group!
